taskDescription: Complete the crossword on Lipid Chemistry and Metabolism (BI4.1-8).

words.clue: Mitochondrial pathway that breaks down fatty acids two carbons at a time
Most abundant lipids in the body, stored in adipose tissue for energy
Steroid synthesised mainly in the liver, precursor to bile acids and hormones
Lipoprotein that transports dietary lipids from intestine to liver
Drug class that inhibits HMG-CoA reductase to lower cholesterol
Shuttle system that transports long-chain fatty acids into mitochondria
Process of fatty acid synthesis from acetyl-CoA in the cytoplasm
Major membrane lipid with a hydrophilic head and hydrophobic tails
